heroSection.title: Homecare Clocking
heroSection.subTitle: React Web + Android App
heroSection.description: React web utility and companion Android app to automate employee attendance tracking and minimize manual logging.

mainContent.overview: Created a React web utility and companion Android app (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose) to automate employee attendance tracking and minimize manual logging.

keyFeature.body: React web utility paired with a native Android app
Automated URI generator for easy employee clock-in
Eliminates paper logs and manual entry errors
Leverages standard dialer functionality for seamless integration

walkthrough.description: Companion Android application built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose to automate employee attendance tracking. Supporting both Simplified Chinese and English interfaces, allow user to pre-configured employee credentials and task codes ready for one-tap Check-In or Check-Out dialing, and leverages standard dialer functionality to seamlessly integrate with existing phone systems, eliminating most of the compatibility issues.
The web dial URI generator emlinates the limit of android-only access and allows users to generate the dial URI on any device with a browser.
